prompt: Tell a mini story (5–6 sentences): where you went last weekend, with whom, what you did there, when you came home.
hint: je suis allé(e)…, on a…, nous sommes… — mix être and avoir pasts.

prompt: Your Canada plan, in French: why you're learning French, what you have to do first, what you're going to do after.
hint: j'apprends le français pour…, d'abord il faut…, après je vais…

prompt: Write a short message cancelling a meeting: apologize, say you can't come, explain what happened (past), propose tomorrow.
hint: pardon…, je ne peux pas venir…, j'ai eu…, on peut… demain ?
